package.name: m1_can_tools
package.description: M1 Damiao CAN bring-up driver and hardware config/test web page: a pure-python DM (MIT/pos-vel/vel) frame codec + per-model limit tables, a pluggable CAN transport (fake/SocketCAN/serial), a maintenance-mode bus owner, and the m1_hwconfig web node (assign/limits/jog/zero/telemetry).
